autor: words that spill forth like cool waters into the dusty dry rock bed of the Soul desiring love. It has been said that I’ve lived in the desert all my life and do not know what it means to be wet.
explicacao: Citação de words that spill forth like cool waters into the dusty dry rock bed of the Soul desiring love. It has been said that I’ve lived in the desert all my life and do not know what it means to be wet. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is poetic and lyrical” articula reflexao, sophia-rose, liquid-me-poetry-and-prose em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como liquid-me-poetry-and-prose.
